_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: Using Slingshot pseudotime to model differentiation from neural crest-like (MPNST‑G1-like) to Schwann cell precursor-like (MPNST‑G2-like) states...inverse relationship between pseudotime and FAP (Spearman's ρ ≈-0.64, p < 0.001)
details: Successfully modeled differentiation trajectory showing inverse relationship between pseudotime and FAP expression (Spearman's ρ ≈-0.64, p < 0.001)
